# Come As You Were - Full LLM context

Title: Come As You Were
Creator: Rick Broider
Website: https://YOUR-DOMAIN.com/
IMDb placeholder: https://www.imdb.com/name/YOUR-IMDB-ID/

## Core positioning
Come As You Were is a premium investor-facing pitch website for a fictionalized prestige mystery inspired by the contaminated public narrative surrounding the death of an iconic musician. The package is positioned for:
- premium limited series
- feature film
- investigative companion podcast
- documentary-adjacent or event-special packaging
- rights conversations and producer attachment

## Core promise
A dead icon. A contaminated truth. An inner circle too compromised to trust.

## Dream target watchers
- Prestige mystery devotees
- Music mythology obsessives
- Podcast-native investigators
- Media-manipulation and narrative-control enthusiasts

## Dream target buyers
- Independent producers
- Executive producers and financiers
- Rights buyers
- Streamer-facing development teams
- Podcast studios and audio partners

## Messaging guardrails
- Keep the work in a legally smarter fictionalized lane.
- Avoid direct factual accusations against real identifiable people.
- Emphasize cultural gravity, actor-bait roles, and podcast-native word of mouth.
- The title should be spoken naturally: "Did you see Come As You Were yet?" / "Did you hear Come As You Were?"

## Contact
